summary: The diff implements all six requirements (REQ-14 through REQ-20) with good coverage. Most acceptance criteria are met. A few minor gaps exist: the banner image rename is referenced in code but the actual image file addition is not evidenced; and the REQ-20 post-claim query invalidation is not clearly evidenced. The SpecialDealsSection refactor addresses REQ-17 by moving data fetching to the parent. Overall the implementation is largely complete.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace the banner image file from marketplace-banner.dim_1200x300.png to ascensions-market-banner.dim_1200x300.png as part of REQ-19 branding rename
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend code references /assets/generated/ascensions-market-banner.dim_1200x300.png in MarketplacePage.tsx, but no new image file is listed in the added or modified files. The image file rename/addition is not evidenced in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: After successful claimAdmin, the dashboard loads admin sections immediately
missing_requirements.reason: AdminDashboard uses a local claimSuccess state flag but there is no evidence of queryClient.invalidateQueries being called on the isAdmin or isAdminClaimed queries after a successful claim, so the backend-verified isAdmin state may not refresh immediately.

hallucinated_features.description: A formal migration.mo module was added implementing OldActor/NewActor type definitions and a run function for canister upgrade data migration
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to extend the AccountListing data model and update relevant calls. A dedicated Motoko migration module with typed old/new actor state was not requested, though it is a reasonable ICP implementation pattern.
